law.text:
Article 1. Definitions

par. 1. For the purposes of this Act, the following definitions apply:

(1) alien: any person who does not provide proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

(3) third-country national: any person who is not a Union citizen and who is not a person enjoying the Community right of free movement, as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

(4) illegal residence: the presence on the territory of an alien who does not or no longer meets the conditions for entry to or residence on the territory.

(11) risk of absconding: the fact that there are reasons to believe that an alien who is the subject of a removal procedure, a procedure for the granting of international protection, or a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection, will abscond, having regard to the criteria listed in paragraph 2.

(14) identified alien: any alien:
(a) who is in possession of a valid travel document, a valid passport, or a valid identity document; or
(b) who has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer; or
(c) who falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

par. 2. The risk of absconding referred to in paragraph 1, (11), must be current and real. It is established following an individual examination and on the basis of one or more of the following objective criteria, taking into account all circumstances specific to each case:

(1) The person concerned has not submitted a residence application following their illegal entry or during their illegal residence, or has not made their application for international protection within the time limit provided for by this Act.

(2) The person concerned has used false or misleading information or false or falsified documents in the context of a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry, or has committed fraud or used other unlawful means.

(3) The person concerned does not cooperate or has not cooperated in the context of their relations with the authorities responsible for the implementation of and/or supervision of compliance with the regulations concerning access to the territory, residence, establishment, and removal of aliens.

(4) The person concerned has made clear that they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, one of the following measures:
(a) a transfer, refusal of entry, or removal measure;
(b) an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended;
(c) a less coercive measure than a deprivation of liberty measure aimed at guaranteeing their transfer, refusal of entry, or removal, regardless of whether it is a liberty-restricting measure or another measure;
(d) a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security;
(e) a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to the measures referred to in (a), (b), (c), or (d).

(5) The person concerned is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

(6) The person concerned has, immediately after having been the subject of a decision refusing entry or residence or a decision terminating their residence, or immediately after having been the subject of a refusal of entry or removal measure, submitted a new residence application or a new application for international protection.

(7) While being questioned on that point, the person concerned concealed the fact that they had already provided their fingerprints in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection, after having submitted an application for international protection.

(8) The person concerned has submitted multiple applications for international protection and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or in one or more other Member States, which have given rise to a negative decision or which have not resulted in the issuance of a residence permit.

(9) While being questioned on that point, the person concerned concealed the fact that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection.

(10) The person concerned has declared, or it appears from their file, that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

(11) The person concerned is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

kb_used.fo:
vocabulary V {
  type Person
  type Procedure
  type Document
  type MemberState
  provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality: Person -> Bool
  is_alien: Person -> Bool
  is_union_citizen: Person -> Bool
  enjoys_community_free_movement_right: Person -> Bool
  is_third_country_national: Person -> Bool
  meets_entry_or_residence_conditions: Person -> Bool
  constitutes_illegal_residence: Person -> Bool
  is_subject_of_removal_procedure: Person -> Bool
  is_subject_of_international_protection_procedure: Person -> Bool
  is_subject_of_dublin_transfer_procedure: Person -> Bool
  reasons_to_believe_will_abscond: Person -> Bool
  individual_examination_performed: Person -> Bool
  risk_is_current_and_real: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_relevant_procedure: Person -> Bool
  risk_of_absconding: Person -> Bool
  possesses_valid_travel_document: Person -> Bool
  national_authority_recognised_as_national: Person -> Bool
  falls_within_laissez_passer_nationality_category: Person -> Bool
  is_identified_alien: Person -> Bool
  at_least_one_objective_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  objective_criterion_1_met: Person -> Bool
  objective_criterion_2_met: Person -> Bool
  objective_criterion_3_met: Person -> Bool
  objective_criterion_4_met: Person -> Bool
  objective_criterion_5_met: Person -> Bool
  objective_criterion_6_met: Person -> Bool
  objective_criterion_7_met: Person -> Bool
  objective_criterion_8_met: Person -> Bool
  objective_criterion_9_met: Person -> Bool
  objective_criterion_10_met: Person -> Bool
  objective_criterion_11_met: Person -> Bool
  no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry: Person -> Bool
  no_international_protection_application_within_time_limit: Person -> Bool
  used_false_or_misleading_information: Person -> Bool
  used_false_or_falsified_documents: Person -> Bool
  committed_fraud_in_procedure: Person -> Bool
  used_other_unlawful_means: Person -> Bool
  does_not_cooperate_with_authorities: Person -> Bool
  declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_measure: Person -> Bool
  already_failed_to_comply_with_measure: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_active_entry_ban_kingdom: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_active_entry_ban_other_member_state: Person -> Bool
  submitted_new_application_after_negative_decision: Person -> Bool
  concealed_fingerprints_in_dublin_state: Person -> Bool
  submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcomes: Person -> Bool
  concealed_prior_protection_application_in_dublin_state: Person -> Bool
  came_for_purposes_other_than_application: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal: Person -> Bool
}

theory T:V {
  ! p in Person: ((~provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality(p))) => ((is_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((~is_union_citizen(p)) & (~enjoys_community_free_movement_right(p)))) => ((is_third_country_national(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((is_alien(p)) & (~meets_entry_or_residence_conditions(p)))) => ((constitutes_illegal_residence(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((is_subject_of_removal_procedure(p)) | (is_subject_of_international_protection_procedure(p)) | (is_subject_of_dublin_transfer_procedure(p)))) => ((subject_to_relevant_procedure(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((reasons_to_believe_will_abscond(p)) & (subject_to_relevant_procedure(p)) & (individual_examination_performed(p)) & (risk_is_current_and_real(p)) & (at_least_one_objective_criterion_met(p)))) => ((risk_of_absconding(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((possesses_valid_travel_document(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((national_authority_recognised_as_national(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((falls_within_laissez_passer_nationality_category(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry(p)) | (no_international_protection_application_within_time_limit(p)))) => ((objective_criterion_1_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((used_false_or_misleading_information(p)) | (used_false_or_falsified_documents(p)) | (committed_fraud_in_procedure(p)) | (used_other_unlawful_means(p)))) => ((objective_criterion_2_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((does_not_cooperate_with_authorities(p))) => ((objective_criterion_3_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_measure(p)) | (already_failed_to_comply_with_measure(p)))) => ((objective_criterion_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((subject_to_active_entry_ban_kingdom(p)) | (subject_to_active_entry_ban_other_member_state(p)))) => ((objective_criterion_5_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((submitted_new_application_after_negative_decision(p))) => ((objective_criterion_6_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((concealed_fingerprints_in_dublin_state(p))) => ((objective_criterion_7_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcomes(p))) => ((objective_criterion_8_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((concealed_prior_protection_application_in_dublin_state(p))) => ((objective_criterion_9_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((came_for_purposes_other_than_application(p))) => ((objective_criterion_10_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal(p))) => ((objective_criterion_11_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((objective_criterion_1_met(p)) | (objective_criterion_2_met(p)) | (objective_criterion_3_met(p)) | (objective_criterion_4_met(p)) | (objective_criterion_5_met(p)) | (objective_criterion_6_met(p)) | (objective_criterion_7_met(p)) | (objective_criterion_8_met(p)) | (objective_criterion_9_met(p)) | (objective_criterion_10_met(p)) | (objective_criterion_11_met(p)))) => ((at_least_one_objective_criterion_met(p))).
}

case.text: Emir is a foreign national, but no removal procedure, no international protection procedure, and no transfer procedure is pending against him. No objective criterion from paragraph 2 has been established either.

questions.text: Has a risk of absconding been established pursuant to Article 1, paragraph 1, point 11 and paragraph 2?

expected.reason: The statutory risk requires a relevant procedure and an actual, real risk based on at least one listed objective criterion. The case states neither is present.

provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality.name: provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality
provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality.description: The person provides proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

is_alien.name: is_alien
is_alien.description: The person is an alien because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

is_union_citizen.name: is_union_citizen
is_union_citizen.description: The person is a Union citizen.

enjoys_community_free_movement_right.name: enjoys_community_free_movement_right
enjoys_community_free_movement_right.description: The person enjoys the Community right of free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is a third-country national: not a Union citizen and not enjoying the Community right of free movement.

meets_entry_or_residence_conditions.name: meets_entry_or_residence_conditions
meets_entry_or_residence_conditions.description: The alien meets the conditions for entry to or residence on the territory.

constitutes_illegal_residence.name: constitutes_illegal_residence
constitutes_illegal_residence.description: The person's presence on the territory constitutes illegal residence.

is_subject_of_removal_procedure.name: is_subject_of_removal_procedure
is_subject_of_removal_procedure.description: The alien is the subject of a removal procedure.

is_subject_of_international_protection_p.name: is_subject_of_international_protection_procedure
is_subject_of_international_protection_p.description: The alien is the subject of a procedure for the granting of international protection.

is_subject_of_dublin_transfer_procedure.name: is_subject_of_dublin_transfer_procedure
is_subject_of_dublin_transfer_procedure.description: The alien is the subject of a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

reasons_to_believe_will_abscond.name: reasons_to_believe_will_abscond
reasons_to_believe_will_abscond.description: There are reasons to believe that the alien will abscond.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the person concerned has been performed.

risk_is_current_and_real.name: risk_is_current_and_real
risk_is_current_and_real.description: The risk of absconding is current and real.

subject_to_relevant_procedure.name: subject_to_relevant_procedure
subject_to_relevant_procedure.description: The alien is subject to a removal procedure, an international protection procedure, or a Dublin transfer procedure.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: A risk of absconding exists for the alien.

possesses_valid_travel_document.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
possesses_valid_travel_document.description: The alien is in possession of a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

national_authority_recognised_as_nationa.name: national_authority_recognised_as_national
national_authority_recognised_as_nationa.description: The national authority of the alien's country has recognised the alien as a national and declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_within_laissez_passer_nationality_.name: falls_within_laissez_passer_nationality_category
falls_within_laissez_passer_nationality_.description: The alien falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

is_identified_alien.name: is_identified_alien
is_identified_alien.description: The alien is an identified alien.

at_least_one_objective_criterion_met.name: at_least_one_objective_criterion_met
at_least_one_objective_criterion_met.description: At least one of the objective criteria in paragraph 2 is present for the person.

objective_criterion_1_met.name: objective_criterion_1_met
objective_criterion_1_met.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2, point 1 is present: the person did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal residence, or did not make an international protection application within the required time limit.

objective_criterion_2_met.name: objective_criterion_2_met
objective_criterion_2_met.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2, point 2 is present: the person used false information, false documents, fraud, or other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

objective_criterion_3_met.name: objective_criterion_3_met
objective_criterion_3_met.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2, point 3 is present: the person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal.

objective_criterion_4_met.name: objective_criterion_4_met
objective_criterion_4_met.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2, point 4 is present: the person has indicated unwillingness to comply with or has already failed to comply with a transfer, refusal of entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or liberty-restricting measure.

objective_criterion_5_met.name: objective_criterion_5_met
objective_criterion_5_met.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2, point 5 is present: the person is subject to an active entry ban in the Kingdom or another Member State.

objective_criterion_6_met.name: objective_criterion_6_met
objective_criterion_6_met.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2, point 6 is present: the person submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a negative decision or removal measure.

objective_criterion_7_met.name: objective_criterion_7_met
objective_criterion_7_met.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2, point 7 is present: the person concealed having previously provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State.

objective_criterion_8_met.name: objective_criterion_8_met
objective_criterion_8_met.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2, point 8 is present: the person submitted multiple international protection or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States that resulted in negative decisions or no residence permit.

objective_criterion_9_met.name: objective_criterion_9_met
objective_criterion_9_met.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2, point 9 is present: the person concealed having previously submitted an international protection application in another Dublin-bound State.

objective_criterion_10_met.name: objective_criterion_10_met
objective_criterion_10_met.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2, point 10 is present: the person declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application.

objective_criterion_11_met.name: objective_criterion_11_met
objective_criterion_11_met.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2, point 11 is present: the person is subject to a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry
no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.description: The person did not submit a residence application following their illegal entry or during their illegal residence.

no_international_protection_application_.name: no_international_protection_application_within_time_limit
no_international_protection_application_.description: The person did not make their application for international protection within the time limit provided for by the Act.

used_false_or_misleading_information.name: used_false_or_misleading_information
used_false_or_misleading_information.description: The person used false or misleading information in the context of a relevant procedure.

used_false_or_falsified_documents.name: used_false_or_falsified_documents
used_false_or_falsified_documents.description: The person used false or falsified documents in the context of a relevant procedure.

committed_fraud_in_procedure.name: committed_fraud_in_procedure
committed_fraud_in_procedure.description: The person committed fraud in the context of a relevant procedure.

used_other_unlawful_means.name: used_other_unlawful_means
used_other_unlawful_means.description: The person used other unlawful means in the context of a relevant procedure.

does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal of aliens.

declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_me.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_measure
declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_me.description: The person has made clear that they do not wish to comply with a transfer, refusal of entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or liberty-restricting measure (domestic or equivalent foreign measure).

already_failed_to_comply_with_measure.name: already_failed_to_comply_with_measure
already_failed_to_comply_with_measure.description: The person has already failed to comply with a transfer, refusal of entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or liberty-restricting measure (domestic or equivalent foreign measure).

subject_to_active_entry_ban_kingdom.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban_kingdom
subject_to_active_entry_ban_kingdom.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

subject_to_active_entry_ban_other_member.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban_other_member_state
subject_to_active_entry_ban_other_member.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

submitted_new_application_after_negative.name: submitted_new_application_after_negative_decision
submitted_new_application_after_negative.description: The person submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence, a decision terminating residence, or a refusal of entry or removal measure.

concealed_fingerprints_in_dublin_state.name: concealed_fingerprints_in_dublin_state
concealed_fingerprints_in_dublin_state.description: The person, while being questioned on that point, concealed the fact that they had already provided their fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State after submitting an international protection application.

submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcomes
submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.description: The person submitted multiple international protection or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States that resulted in negative decisions or no residence permit.

concealed_prior_protection_application_i.name: concealed_prior_protection_application_in_dublin_state
concealed_prior_protection_application_i.description: The person, while being questioned on that point, concealed the fact that they had previously submitted an international protection application in another Dublin-bound State.

came_for_purposes_other_than_application.name: came_for_purposes_other_than_application
came_for_purposes_other_than_application.description: The person declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.description: The person is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

routing.question: Has a risk of absconding been established pursuant to Article 1, paragraph 1, point 11 and paragraph 2?
